nasb.text: And he ordered the chariot to stop; and they both went down into the water, Philip as well as the eunuch, and he baptized him.

esv.text: And he commanded the chariot to stop, and they both went down into the water, Philip and the eunuch, and he baptized him.

cnv.text: 於是太監吩咐停車，腓利和他兩人下到水中，腓利就給他施洗。

ccb.text: 于是，太监吩咐停车，二人一同下到水里，腓利为他施洗。

csbs.text: 于是他吩咐停下马车，腓利和太监，两个人下到水里，腓利就给他施洗。
